title: angelonia cornigera
intro: Angelonia cornigera, also known as Mexican Angel Trumpet or Devil's Trumpet, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It belongs to the Apocynaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Angelonia cornigera include its ability to treat fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antidote for poisoning. Herbal preparations of Angelonia cornigera include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be guided by a medical professional due to potential toxicity.
